subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and two cherished handmaidens of God! His honor Ardeshir Khodadad came to these parts and for pilgrimage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و دو کنیز عزیز خدا جناب اردشیر خداداد باینصفحات آمد و بزیارت
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @growth of the Cause, @business; financial; property matters
